parameters.name: Rule
parameters.description:
Rule content. Use a conditional expression to match user requests. Do not set this parameter when adding a global configuration. There are two scenarios:

- Match all incoming requests: Set the value to true.

- Match specific requests: Set the value to a custom expression, such as: (http.host eq "video.example.com").

parameters.name: RuleEnable
parameters.description:
Rule switch. Do not set this parameter when adding a global configuration. Valid values:

- on: Enable.

- off: Disable.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: Rule name. Do not set this parameter when adding a global configuration.

parameters.name: Sequence
parameters.description: Rule execution order. A smaller value indicates higher priority.

parameters.name: SiteId
parameters.description: Site ID. Call the [ListSites](~~2850189~~) API to get it.

parameters.name: SiteVersion
parameters.description: Site configuration version number. For sites with version management enabled, use this parameter to specify the site version where the configuration takes effect. The default is version 0.
